name: @baryonlabs/pi-agent-harness
description_en: Team-architecture factory for the pi coding agent — turns one domain sentence into a multi-agent team: specialist agents (.pi/agents), their skills (.pi/skills), and orchestration prompts (.pi/prompts), with six team patterns and a bundled subagent (singl
